tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an existing ScanConfig and its child resources.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsList
tools.description: Lists ScanConfigs under a given project.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsPatch
tools.description: Updates a ScanConfig. This method support partial update of a ScanConfig.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsScanRunsCrawledUrlsList
tools.description: List CrawledUrls under a given ScanRun.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsScanRunsFindingsList
tools.description: List Findings under a given ScanRun.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsScanRunsFindingTypeStatsList
tools.description: List all FindingTypeStats under a given ScanRun.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsScanRunsList
tools.description: Lists ScanRuns under a given ScanConfig, in descending order of ScanRun stop time.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsScanRunsStop
tools.description: Stops a ScanRun. The stopped ScanRun is returned.

tools.name: projects.websecurityscannerProjectsScanConfigsStart
tools.description: Start a ScanRun according to the given ScanConfig.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
